dalone Marks This directory contains the minimal files needed to plot using Ptplot3.1. Ptplot3.1 is the last release of Ptplot that does not require the Java 1.3 Plug-in. The Ptplot3.1 page is at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolem

://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolemy/plot/doc/index.htm The Ptplot home page is at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot/ This directory contains the following files. StandaloneMarks.htm (this file) This file is based on http://

arks.htm (this file) This file is based on http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolemy/plot/demo/Marks.htm To view the applet code for this file, use view source in your browser. standalonePlotMLSample.txt Based on http://ptolemy.eecs.ber

ePlotMLSample.txt Based on http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolemy/plot/demo/plotmlSample.txt However, standalonePlotMLSample.txt refers to the dtd as <!DOCTYPE plot SYSTEM "plotml.dtd"?> plotml.dtd Exact copy of http://ptolemy.eecs.b

"?> plotml.dtd Exact copy of http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolemy/plot/plotml/plotml.dtd This file defines syntax of the PlotML language. plotmlapplet.jar Exact copy of http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolemy/plot/p

my.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot3.1/ptolemy/plot/plotmlapplet.jar The above files can be found in a zip file at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/java/ptplot/standalone/ptplot3.1standalone.zip The applet Use view source in your browser to see the html

et Use view source in your browser to see the html that runs this applet. If your browser recognized the applet tag, you would see an applet here. Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
